name: Christmas Premium Gift Wrap Plaids - Wondershop™
description:
Bring classic style to your festive presents by wrapping them in this 3-Roll Christmas Premium Plaid Gift Wraps. Featuring plaid prints in blue, red and green hues, this festive gift wrap pack adds the perfect holiday cheer to your gifts. This paper gift wrap comes in a combined 360-inch length roll to give you plenty for wrapping a variety of holiday presents.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
